title: Christmas Decoration 30cm Metal Sign Hanging Red and White - (Gingerbread Man)
features: Elevate your holiday décor with our charming Christmas metal hanging sign decoration, a delightful addition to any festive setting.
Measuring approximately 30cm x 29.5cm, this eye-catching sign features a classic red and white colour scheme that embodies the spirit of Christmas
Crafted from durable metal, it is designed to withstand the test of time, making it a perfect piece to bring out year after year.
The included hanging hook at the top makes it ideal for hanging in your home, office, or even as a thoughtful gift for loved ones.
Whether you’re decorating your front porch, living room, or holiday party, this sign is sure to spread joy and warmth, inviting everyone to embrace the magic of the season.
Don’t miss the chance to enhance your holiday ambiance with this festive decoration that captures the essence of Christmas!
